package fixture

import "context"

type Nested struct{}

func (m Nested) Encode(l interface{}, ctx context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	t := mustTenant(ctx)
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		w.WriteByte(0)
		if t.Region() == "GMS" {
			w.WriteInt(1)
			if t.MajorVersion() > 87 {
				w.WriteLong(2)
			}
		}
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}
